SECTOR 01 · PADDOCK

Monaco
Preparation

Race day begins before the sun peaks. Precision, luxury, and calm before the storm.

TIRE TEMP
82°C
FUEL LOAD
95%
ENGINE
READY
01

Track Walk

Engineers study every apex, kerb, and straight. Monaco demands perfection.

07:30 LOCAL
02

Setup Lock

Final suspension adjustments. Softest settings, highest downforce package.

09:15 LOCAL
03

Driver In

Helmet on. HANS device locked. The crowd begins to breathe differently.

13:50 LOCAL

SECTOR 02 · GOLDEN HOUR

The Sun
Descends

Between day and night, the circuit transforms.
Floodlights warm up. The air cools. The race changes.

Daylight
Golden Hour
Lights On
Night Race
"The circuit looks entirely different under floodlights.
Every surface glows. Every shadow deepens." — Race Engineer, Singapore GP
SECTOR 03 · NIGHT RACE

Neon
Circuit

Singapore. Saudi Arabia. The world's most spectacular night races.

🇸🇬

Marina Bay

Street circuit under the city skyline. 5067 metres of pure theatre.

23 CORNERS · 5.067 KM
🇸🇦

Jeddah Corniche

Fastest street circuit on the calendar. Walls blur at 250+ km/h.

27 CORNERS · 6.174 KM
🌃

Las Vegas Strip

Neon, speed, and spectacle. F1 meets the city that never sleeps.

17 CORNERS · 6.201 KM
RACING LINE · MARINA BAY S1
SECTOR 04 · FINISH LINE

Some races
begin after
sunset.

The night circuit isn't just a race.
It's where legends are made under the lights.
